---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a practical workflow improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use case

What repeated work should this remove?

## Desired workflow

Describe the input, action, and output.

## Feishu/Lark output

If this writes to Feishu/Lark, describe the target table, doc, or notification shape.

## Boundary

- [ ] This does not require bypassing login, paywalls, captchas, encryption, or platform access controls.
- [ ] This does not require collecting private or personal information by default.
- [ ] This can be tested with `--dry-run` or local files.
